name: Perfect Goal
description: Exposes the Perfect Goal framework as a callable tool inside openclaw agents. When called, returns the methodology + 13-section template + 44-point rubric + goal-type matrix with the caller's topic primed as Phase 1 context. The agent continues the workflow in its own LLM context. Upstream: https://github.com/apple-techie/perfect-goal

frameworkPath.description: Absolute path to the perfect-goal repo's framework files (TEMPLATE.md / METHODOLOGY.md / RUBRIC.md / GOAL-TYPES.md). Defaults to <plugin_dir>/framework/ which install.sh symlinks at install time. Override only if you bundle the framework elsewhere.

defaultType.description: Default goal type when caller omits the 'type' arg. Must be one of bug|feature|migration|infra|research|refactor|unification|auto. Default 'auto'.

defaultScope.description: Default scope (tight|wide) when caller omits 'scope'. Default 'tight'.

defaultTier.description: Default tier (A|AB|ABC) when caller omits 'tier'. Default 'AB'.
